attacking_style: Opportunistic late-race attacks at 1km to go, exploiting gradient changes where steep climbs flatten out. Strikes when GC rivals show visible weakness on the steepest sections.
team_tactics: Operates independently without dedicated teammate support on climbs. Self-sufficient positioning to track GC threats personally before launching solo moves.
terrain_preference: Excels on climbs with gradient variation (12-13% steep ramps transitioning to flatter sections). Uses changing gradients tactically to time attacks when rivals are recovering from maximum efforts.
vulnerability: Lack of teammate support on climbs leaves him exposed to coordinated team attacks. Must track threats personally, which could drain energy in repeated surge scenarios.
key_patterns: Attacks precisely at gradient transitions from steep to flat sections (1km to go timing)
Tracks GC threats independently without team support, conserving energy on steepest gradients
Exploits visible rival weakness on maximum gradient sections to launch winning moves
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation from 2021 insufficient to assess current form trajectory or recent development
